recentTweets.text:
America is for Americans. 

My @FoxNews op-ed explains why Congress must end the abuse of birthright citizenship and restore the original intent of the 14th Amendment. https://t.co/bf9FNENm6t

I was proud to vote for the Water Resources Development Act of 2026 that just passed @TransportGOP. This bill advances priorities that improve the efficiency and effectiveness of our water infrastructure across America. https://t.co/ny5f8zjMpJ

If American citizenship is being marketed like a commodity, Congress has a duty to stop it. My Birthright Citizenship Act ends this abuse and restores the original intent of the 14th Amendment. 

Let’s get it to the President’s desk. https://t.co/v0BVgelCs9
Birth tourism isn’t a future problem, it’s a current epidemic. Congress must legislate and clarify the Fourteenth Amendment today. https://t.co/f8ZxTRarwc

Seeing my granddaughter beneath these words in the @HouseScience hearing room says it all.

The future of American innovation depends on the work we do today.

“Where there is no vision, the people perish.” — Proverbs 29:1 https://t.co/JpiMl5cy6M

RT @housescience: “Where there is no vision, the people perish.” — Proverbs 29:18

We’re proud to have this verse inscribed on our committe…

The next 250 years of American sovereignty begin with securing the meaning of American citizenship. 

Congress should pass my Birthright Citizenship Act.

.@SpeakerJohnson is RIGHT. Birthright citizenship was NEVER meant to be an incentive for illegal immigration or birth tourism. 

Congress already has the answer: pass my Birthright Citizenship Act and RESTORE the original meaning of the Constitution.

Colonists set out in search of a land to worship God, love their family, and build a home. In the process they found freedom and liberty and gave us the greatest country known to man. https://t.co/8aHDbYedNq

Today, we celebrate not only 
250 years of independence, but also one year since @POTUS signed the Working Families Tax Cuts into law. 

The largest tax cut in American history! https://t.co/UWbzzOjedU
The lyrics of a hymn have carried us through the last 250 years, and it’ll continue to be our battle cry for years to come. https://t.co/bnC7Bbl7qP
Family legend says they signed it and immediately asked, “Which way to Texas?” https://t.co/cegymbnv7G

RT @RepublicanStudy: 🚨 Republicans are delivering wins that will be the foundation for the next 250 years of American GREATNESS⤵️

✅ The la…

I totally agree with President Trump, Congress must act! Kavanaugh was right in his opinion, we must clarify statute surrounding birthright citizenship and who is “subject to the jurisdiction” of the U.S. My bill does exactly that! @WhiteHouse https://t.co/QRS5h1CKkV

Huge win for women’s sports at SCOTUS today.

Clarence Thomas said it best: “Men and boys with gender dysphoria are not women or girls, even if they believe they are.”

Reality wins. https://t.co/oul01VVNLo
The left says borders shouldn’t matter. Then why does the side of the border you’re born on suddenly matter so much?

AMERICA IS FOR AMERICANS.

A nation that refuses to defend the meaning of its own citizenship is a nation surrendering its sovereignty. If we can’t protect who becomes an American, we won’t have a country left to protect.

A Supreme Court without the courage to confront the abuse of birthright citizenship is a disgrace to the American people. Americans have sacrificed to preserve the value of U.S. citizenship.

Refusing to defend American citizenship risks losing the very nation it represents.
🚨Tune in!

.@NASAArtemis embodies everything we’re celebrating during @America250— the spirit of innovation and the determination to push to new frontiers. 

For 250 years, America has never stopped reaching higher, and we’re just getting started.

RT @housescience: 🗓️ Wednesday, July 1st at 10:00 AM 

Full Committee Hearing - “Weathering the Solar Storm: Advancing America's Space Weat…

The faces of Mamdani’s movement are people who wipe their hands on the American flag, blame white supremacy for 9/11, advocate for decriminalizing prostitution, and celebrate anti-American extremism.

If you think this stays in New York, think again.

Wake up, America. https://t.co/H3ull5uq4N

Four years ago today, the Dobbs decision overturned Roe v. Wade and marked a historic victory for life.

But our work is not finished. I will never stop fighting to protect the unborn and defend the most vulnerable among us. https://t.co/UVmIn30WIP
RT @housescience: Tomorrow, our Committee will mark up bipartisan AI legislation focused on expanding AI education, strengthening the workf…

The American flag isn’t something you wipe your hands on.

Too many Americans have fought and died under that flag for it to be treated like a joke. Sickening. https://t.co/pjovaSPxX3

54 years ago today, Title IX became law, guaranteeing equal opportunities for women and girls in education programs.

President Trump and @HouseGOP are restoring common sense, protecting women’s sports, and ensuring Title IX is NOT used as a vehicle for radical ideology.

A plan today means a prepared tomorrow. 

I had the opportunity to join Chambers County for their annual Hurricane Workshop. These law enforcement officers are going above and beyond to ensure Southeast Texans are prepared as we enter hurricane season. https://t.co/blcFNCt0ea

It has been the greatest blessing of my life to have the title of “Dad.”

Our nation is built on strong fathers, strong families, and the values they pass on. I hope you enjoy a blessed day surrounded by loved ones and filled with gratitude.

Happy Father’s Day! https://t.co/c4IRicelAl
RT @SecretaryWright: Honored to have had the opportunity to visit Houston, TX—the energy capital of the world and epicenter of American ene…

The next few weeks in Washington will be historic as America celebrates its 250th birthday. 🇺🇸

From special events to once-in-a-generation celebrations, follow @Freedom250 for the latest updates, announcements, and ticket information.

We should never take our eyes off of the Iranian regime. For decades, its leaders have oppressed their own people, sponsored terror abroad, and pursued power at any cost. America should pray for peace, but never be naive about evil.
Happy Birthday, @USArmy. Your grit and determination has led our nation through some of the hardest times in history. May we live our lives worthy of your sacrifice. https://t.co/LYeSZHAXxK

The road to American energy dominance runs through Southeast Texas, and @Port_Houston is leading the way.

This morning, I was honored to join @SecretaryWright to discuss how our region’s ports and energy producers are powering America’s economy and securing our energy future. https://t.co/U0rOjmlhtW

This week, I was proud to vote for my friend @RepBurgessOwens’ No Aid for Ghost Students Act. Every dollar spent fraudulently is a dollar stolen from deserving students. By rooting out dishonest FAFSA applications, we can ensure aid goes to those who truly need it.

An A+ from @NumbersUSA isn’t about a grade, it’s about keeping promises. Secure the border. Enforce the law. Put Americans first. 

I’ll never stop fighting for the safety, security, and sovereignty of our nation. https://t.co/WPplJSttbs

Praying for the American service members targeted by Iran’s attack. Our country will always stand behind those brave enough to wear our nation’s uniform.

Thankful @POTUS will take whatever action is necessary to ensure attacks on the United States will not go unanswered. https://t.co/yHPX1FTjiW
RT @housescience: Congratulations to the Artemis III crew! Commander Randy Bresnik, Pilot Luca Parmitano, and Mission Specialists Andre Dou…
RT @housescience: Ahead of tomorrow’s hearing with Secretary of Energy Chris Wright, Chairman @RepBrianBabin previews what to expect as the…

I am humbled and honored to be named a Distinguished Alumnus by @LamarUniversity. Lamar has had a lasting impact on my life, and I am proud to join the distinguished men and women who have received this recognition. 

Thank you, Lamar, for this incredible honor. https://t.co/ktnWvJGTiT

Days to count the votes. The Republican leads on Election Night. Then somehow ends up out of the runoff against two Democrats?

That doesn’t pass the smell test.

I agree 100% with President Trump. The Senate Parliamentarian should be removed immediately. Her partisan rulings have repeatedly blocked the will of the American people. 

If we want honest elections, the Senate MUST pass the SAVE Act and ensure that only U.S. citizens vote in

82 years ago, men braved the beaches of Normandy to shift the tide of democracy while the world lay watching. Because of their unwavering commitment to what is good and true, our European allies live in freedom. Their sacrifice will never be wasted and will forever be remembered. https://t.co/OJ5D4PsCqC

Today, I introduced the SUSTAIN Act with @SenTedCruz and @RepHoulahan to ensure our Guard units are not hollowed out or pushed toward a mission cliff without a follow-on plan.

The MQ-9’s mission remains vital to our national defense.

https://t.co/pIM42v01BD
Need proof Democrats have lost touch with reality? Exhibit A: taxpayer-funded transgender mouse experiments.

Today marks 61 years since the first American spacewalk. For over half a century, @NASA has continued the spirit of ingenuity and exploration, pushing the boundaries of what humanity thought possible. https://t.co/B0j7xwuswL
Happy Texas Tuesday! https://t.co/57hdTJDlms

Congratulations to the Liberty Lady Panthers on capturing the Class 4A Division II State Championship!

After bringing home the title last year, these young ladies have once again proven they are the very best in Texas. https://t.co/bkHoe2btMy

This week, I hosted a business roundtable in Beaumont with leaders from large and small businesses across Southeast Texas.

Hearing directly from the job creators who keep our economy moving is invaluable. I’ll keep fighting for policies that help East Texas businesses grow, https://t.co/rHSP1I2ODm

The best of our country are standing in the gap to protect the very people who express their “thanks” with riots and spray bottles. Truly a top-tier classless act.

https://t.co/vmyA7TRrNb

To every family grieving the loss of a loved one who didn’t make it home, thank you for your sacrifice. This Memorial Day, may we never forget that freedom isn’t free and the price so many paid for it. https://t.co/WhfW9eZzcy

America is returning to the Moon, and this time we’re there to stay. 

Exciting to see @NASA advancing plans for a long-term Moon Base and America’s future on the lunar surface.

As we wait for more information, one thing is clear: the culture of political violence in this country must end. Thankful President Trump is safe and praying for everyone involved, including the innocent bystander reportedly in critical condition and the brave Secret Service

The foundation of our country was built on the sacrifice of brave men and women who gave everything so future generations could grow up in the land of the free. I pray we remember the price they paid every day, but especially this weekend as we honor their lives, their service, https://t.co/qMckAQG8UE
President Trump is right. Birthright citizenship has been abused for far too long. That’s why I introduced the Birthright Citizenship Act. Let’s pass it and put an end to this madness.

Happening NOW: @TransportGOP is considering the BUILD America 250 Act, legislation to strengthen America’s highways, bridges, freight corridors, and transportation systems for the next generation. 

Watch live: https://t.co/kJBgQrmxSJ

Roxanne and I don’t get to share the stage as often as we once did, so when we had the chance last week, we took it. Thanks to the Congressional Musicians’ Caucus and @cong_record for a great night of music! https://t.co/Rk5ztT5Glp

Transportation and infrastructure are the bedrock of the American economy. As the senior Texan on @TransportGOP, I look forward to advancing legislation that keeps our nation moving. https://t.co/S4mAKHTX2J

Every morning, law enforcement officers pin on a badge knowing the risks that come with it. Today, we honor the men and women who pinned on that badge for the last time and made the ultimate sacrifice to keep our communities safe.

My prayers are with every family grieving the https://t.co/AvFiAqgakb

RT @RepMaryMiller: President Trump is leading the most pro-family agenda in modern history.

Through https://t.co/Gg38a6SCEY, the expanded…

They’re suing @SecRollins for mentioning Jesus in emails.

The same crowd trying to erase faith from public life seems to forget America was founded on religious liberty.

I agree with John Adams when he said, religion and morality are “indispensable supports” to prosperity.
